title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Mango Hotels

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Mango Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Mango Hotels in Aurangabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mango Hotels:
Mango Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mango Hotels!
